overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban corridor transitioning from a covered walkway through a dark Arasaka-branded underpass to an open-air elevated walkway. The environment features distinctive red neon lighting, corporate advertising, and sleek modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway next to a concrete barrier

entered.detail: overhead concrete ceiling structure covering the walkway
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the left wall
low concrete barrier separating walkway from the road
discarded newspaper or magazine lying on the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban walkway with distinctive red neon light strips running along the left wall. The camera moves forward past a discarded newspaper on the concrete sidewalk, approaching a dark tunnel entrance ahead.

events.description: enters dark enclosed corridor from the covered walkway
blue illuminated pool becomes visible on the left side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark corridor toward the bright exit visible in the distance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement with text 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' and 'RELIC' on the right wall
illuminated blue water or light reflection visible through an opening on the left
thick cylindrical industrial pipes mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker enclosed corridor with a large 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' billboard dominating the right wall. The camera continues walking toward a bright exit at the far end, passing large industrial pipes and catching glimpses of a blue illuminated pool on the left.

events.description: Arasaka corporate logo becomes visible on the left wall
futuristic vehicle passes by on the lower road to the left

agents.ego_description: approaching the bright exit of the underpass while passing corporate signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the road below the walkway

entered.detail: large wall with white Arasaka corporation logo and text branding
speed limit sign displaying '40' mounted on a pole
stack of cardboard boxes and debris on the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens slightly to reveal Arasaka corporate branding on the left wall as the camera approaches a bright exit. A speed limit sign and cardboard boxes appear near the path, while a futuristic vehicle passes by on the road below. The 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' billboard recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor walkway with highway view

events.description: exits covered underpass into open air with clear sky visible
abrupt shift from artificial neon lighting to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated outdoor walkway overlooking the urban highway infrastructure

entered.detail: clear blue sky visible overhead as the roof ends
metal safety railing along the left edge of the elevated walkway
multi-level highway infrastructure and overpasses visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into bright daylight on an elevated outdoor walkway. The scene opens up to reveal a clear blue sky and extensive highway overpass infrastructure. The artificial neon lighting gives way to natural sunlight as the camera continues along the concrete path with safety railings overlooking the lower road levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit corporate corridor into the bright openness of an elevated urban highway. It begins on a covered walkway illuminated by red neon strips, moving past a discarded newspaper toward a dark tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the enclosed underpass, the lighting dims and the view is dominated by a large Secure Your Soul billboard and industrial piping, passing a blue illuminated pool on the left. The scene then shifts as Arasaka corporate branding appears and the corridor opens toward a bright exit, passing cardboard boxes and a speed limit sign while a futuristic vehicle glides by on the road below. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into natural daylight on an outdoor walkway, where the artificial neon gives way to a clear blue sky and expansive highway infrastructure.
